economic_ownership_map.label: Tangible common equity
economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2025 annual report tangible common equity and TBVPS.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Marks tangible capital for credit, asset quality, and regulatory constraints rather than treating all book value as distributable.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Normalized franchise return value
economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2025 RoTCE was 7.7%; a full-cycle, segment-level return bridge is still required.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Present value of sustainable returns above or below the required return on tangible common equity.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Transformation and excess-capital realization
economic_ownership_map.evidence: CET1 was 13.18%; release timing and regulatory minimums remain unverified.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Only value capital that can be returned after transformation costs, stress losses, and regulatory buffers.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Credit, funding, and regulatory reserve
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Annual-report credit, funding, and regulatory disclosures; detailed stress reconciliation pending.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Explicit deduction for a worse credit cycle, funding pressure, conduct costs, and capital trapped above management targets.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

method_route.label: Credit, funding, and normalized financial returns
failure_modes: industrial EV multiple applied to a financial balance sheet
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Tangible common equity
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Marks tangible capital for credit, asset quality, and regulatory constraints rather than treating all book value as distributable.

top_value_drivers.label: Normalized franchise return value
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Present value of sustainable returns above or below the required return on tangible common equity.

top_value_drivers.label: Transformation and excess-capital realization
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Only value capital that can be returned after transformation costs, stress losses, and regulatory buffers.

top_value_drivers.label: Credit, funding, and regulatory reserve
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Explicit deduction for a worse credit cycle, funding pressure, conduct costs, and capital trapped above management targets.

blockers: credit_funding_and_regulatory_reserve: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
distributable_capital: Reconcile regulatory minimums, management buffers, stress losses, transformation costs, and the timing of actual capital return.
normalized_franchise_returns: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
segment_rotce_normalization: Reconcile segment tangible capital, through-cycle credit costs, expenses, taxes, and normalized RoTCE.
stress_claims: Build an independently reviewed credit, funding, legal, and regulatory stress bridge.
tangible_common_equity: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
transformation_and_excess_capital: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Tangible capital, normalized RoTCE, credit loss, regulation, and capital return.
